title: Kenyan Fritter Bites
description: Crispy Kenyan-inspired fritters filled with spicy bryndza cheese and served as a snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, egg, and water to make a dough.
Add chopped onion and spicy pepper to the dough and mix well.
Crumb bryndza cheese into the dough and mix until combined.
Cover the dough and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Heat vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of dough into the hot oil and flatten slightly.
Fry fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Drain fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
